title: Interview with Mitchell Hashimoto about Ghostty and Zig
summary: Mitchell Hashimoto 在访谈中讨论了 Ghostty 终端模拟器与 Zig 编程语言的设计理念和开发经验。
translated_summary: Mitchell Hashimoto discusses the design philosophy and development experience of the Ghostty terminal emulator and the Zig programming language in this interview.
